Zapier AI Email
AI Customer Email Auto-Reply Automation

Automatically analyzes incoming Gmail messages with AI, sends personalized replies, and logs all interactions to Google Sheets — zero manual effort.

Built in Zapier, this 4-step automation monitors Gmail for new messages, passes them through AI by Zapier to analyze intent and generate context-aware replies, sends the response automatically, then creates a row in Google Sheets for full audit tracking. Eliminates hours of manual inbox management.
Zapier AI Support
AI Customer Support Ticket Automation

Google Forms submissions trigger a full pipeline: data logged to Sheets, AI analyzes and categorizes, automated email sent — all verified with live run logs.

This Zapier workflow captures new Google Form responses, appends them to a Sheets tracker, runs them through AI by Zapier for analysis and categorization, then fires a tailored Gmail reply. Tested and confirmed successful on May 17, 2026.
Zapier AI Routing
AI Support Ticket Router with 4 Paths

Advanced conditional routing — AI classifies each ticket, then branches across 4 paths (A/B/C/D) for specialized email responses and Sheets logging per category.

AI Customer Support Ticket Router with Different Paths A sophisticated Zapier automation using Path logic to intelligently route support tickets. Google Forms feeds into Sheets and AI analysis, then the Paths module splits into 4 branches — each with its own Gmail action and Sheets update. Handles Billing, Technical, General, and Escalation ticket types automatically.
Zapier Lead Gen
AI Lead Capture + Auto-Reply System

Captures form leads, logs to a spreadsheet, and immediately sends dual follow-up emails — one to the lead, one internally — all within seconds of form submission.

A 4-step Zapier Zap: Google Forms triggers it, a spreadsheet row is created for the lead record, then two Gmail sends happen in parallel — a personalized welcome to the prospect and an internal notification to the team. Instant, reliable, and always-on.
n8n AI Agent RAG
AI-Powered Customer Support Workflow

Full n8n pipeline: Gmail trigger → text classifier → AI Agent backed by Pinecone vector memory → auto-reply. Non-support emails silently skipped.

Built in n8n, this workflow triggers on incoming Gmail, classifies the email with an OpenRouter-powered text classifier, routes support queries to an AI Agent with Pinecone Vector Store memory for context-aware answers, then replies directly. Non-support emails hit a no-op branch cleanly.
GoHighLevel CRM SMS
Lead Nurture & Appointment Workflow

GHL automation that triggers on new form submissions, qualifies leads, books appointments, and sends multi-touch SMS reminders at 30 min and 2 hours before the meeting.

OQn536kRFBk/ig9lEQD7KHIREEiyiIiP/Z A full GoHighLevel automation: form submission fires the flow, contact is created/updated, SMS is sent, appointment checked, and branches split for booked vs unbooked leads. Pre-appointment SMS reminders go out at the 30-minute and 2-hour marks — drastically reducing no-shows.
GoHighLevel CRM
No-Show Recovery Workflow

When an appointment status hits "No Show," the workflow fires an SMS, updates the CRM opportunity stage, and prepares re-engagement — automatically.

Triggered by appointment status "NO show" in GoHighLevel, this 3-step workflow sends an SMS to the contact, creates or updates an opportunity in the pipeline, then ends. Keeps no-shows from falling through the cracks and automates re-booking outreach.
GoHighLevel Pipeline Dental
Dental Implant Booking Pipeline

Custom CRM pipeline tracking leads from "New Lead" through Consultation, Confirmation, Completion, Review, and Lost — built for a dental practice.

AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAB//Z A fully staged GoHighLevel pipeline for a dental implant practice: New Lead → Contacted → Consultation Booked → Appointment Confirmed → Appointment Completed → Review Requested → Lost Lead. Each stage triggers specific automations for follow-up, reminders, and review requests.
n8n RAG AI Agent
RAG Pipeline & AI Chatbot

An n8n RAG (Retrieval Augmented Generation) pipeline: Google Drive triggers on new file creation, downloads the file, loads it into Pinecone vector store with OpenAI embeddings, and exposes a chat interface where an AI Agent answers questions using that document context — a complete knowledge chatbot.
GoHighLevel Review
Treatment Completed → Review Request

When a pipeline stage reaches "Treatment Completed," the system waits, sends an SMS thank-you, then automatically fires a review request — hands-free reputation building.

Triggered by Pipeline Stage Changed to "Treatment Completed" in GoHighLevel. The workflow waits a defined interval, sends an SMS thank-you message, then sends a review request — automating the entire post-treatment patient experience and boosting online reputation with zero manual follow-up.
Make.com Notion AI
Auto Client Report Generator

Notion-triggered Make.com scenario that uses Claude AI to write client reports, drafts them in Gmail, notifies via Telegram, and updates the Notion database — fully automated.

Automatically Create Client Report (Make.com) AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAH/2Q== A Make.com scenario that watches a Notion database for scheduled reports, calls Anthropic Claude to generate the report content, creates a Gmail draft, sends a Telegram notification to the account manager, and updates the Notion record — all without any human touch.
Make.com Claude AI Telegram
Media Opportunity Scanner

Gmail → Claude AI → Notion → Claude AI → Telegram. Monitors inbox for PR opportunities, summarizes with AI, logs to Notion, and pings you on Telegram every 15 minutes.

A 5-node Make.com scenario running every 15 minutes: Gmail watches for incoming media or PR emails, Anthropic Claude performs a simple text prompt to extract opportunities, Notion creates a database item, a second Claude prompt drafts the pitch summary, and Telegram Bot fires a notification — a complete media monitoring pipeline.
GoHighLevel Funnel Dental
Dental Practice Landing Funnel

A complete GoHighLevel funnel for a dental practice — hero section, service grid, about section, stats, and an embedded booking calendar with GHL integration.

A full GoHighLevel funnel page built for a dental clinic: modern hero section with CTA, 6-service grid (cosmetic dentistry, implants, preventive, family care), social proof section with stats (15+ years, 10K+ clients, 4.9★), and an embedded GHL calendar for frictionless appointment booking.
GoHighLevel Funnel Real Estate
Corporate Housing Funnel (SoLiving)

Lead capture funnel for a corporate housing brand — features grid, testimonials, and an intake form feeding directly into a GHL CRM pipeline for instant follow-up.

Corporate Housing Funnel – SoLiving (GoHighLevel) A GoHighLevel funnel for SoLiving corporate housing: benefit features (furnished, Wi-Fi, concierge, housekeeping, flex stays, prime locations), three client testimonials for social proof, and a lead intake form that captures first name, last name, phone, and email — all feeding directly into a CRM pipeline for automated follow-up.
What I Do

Services

End-to-end automation solutions tailored to your business workflows.

⚡
Process Automation

Streamline repetitive tasks using modern automation tools and integrations.

  • Zapier & Make.com workflows
  • CRM automation
  • Form & data pipelines
🤖
AI Workflow Integration

Embed AI agents and language models into your existing business processes.

  • AI-powered email triage
  • RAG chatbots with vector memory
  • Intelligent ticket routing
💼
CRM Setup & Automation

Build and automate full CRM pipelines from lead capture to closed deal.

  • GoHighLevel / HubSpot / Pipedrive
  • Pipeline & stage automation
  • No-show & follow-up sequences
📊
Funnel & Landing Page Build

Design and deploy conversion-focused funnels connected to automated follow-up.

  • GoHighLevel funnel design
  • Calendar & booking integration
  • Lead capture → CRM pipeline
